fields.description:
ABOUT THE TEAM

OpenAI’s mission is to ensure the responsible and widespread adoption of artificial intelligence. In support of that mission, the Marketing team helps deeply understand customer audiences and market dynamics, influence the development of the right products, build sustainable and customer-aligned monetization models, and drive awareness, adoption, and usage across OpenAI’s products and platform.

We take a data-driven approach to understand markets, develop monetization strategies, and uncover customer needs that shape product strategy and messaging. We partner closely with Sales, Partnerships, Product, Engineering, Research, Comms, and Design to deliver a cohesive end-to-end customer experience and lead go-to-market efforts for new product launches across channels.

About this role

We’re looking for a Partner Marketing leader to build and scale OpenAI’s advertising partner ecosystem—spanning distribution platforms, technology partners, agencies and measurement providers. This role will define how OpenAI collaborates with partners to drive joint go-to-market success, accelerate advertiser adoption, and establish credibility across the broader advertising landscape.

You’ll operate at the intersection of product marketing, partnerships, and demand generation—developing and executing joint marketing strategies that create mutual business value for OpenAI and its partners. This includes building co-branded campaigns, enabling partner sales teams, and ensuring OpenAI’s advertising solutions are effectively positioned, distributed, and measured across the ecosystem.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in building from first principles, can manage complex partner relationships, and is excited to shape how a new advertising platform integrates into the broader marketing technology and agency landscape.


IN THIS ROLE YOU WILL:

 - Define OpenAI’s partner marketing and ecosystem strategy across key categories including ad tech platforms, data providers, distributors, and agencies.

 - Build and execute joint go-to-market (GTM) plans with partners, including integrated campaigns (events, webinars, content, product launches) that drive pipeline, adoption, and revenue.

 - Develop and manage co-branded marketing programs, including case studies, thought leadership, digital campaigns, and industry activations that highlight joint value.

 - Act as the primary marketing partner contact, fostering strong relationships, alignment, and trust with key external partners.

 - Create partner-facing content and collateral, including sales decks, solution briefs, playbooks, and campaign assets that enable partners to effectively position OpenAI’s advertising solutions.

 - Support partner and agency sales enablement, building training programs, toolkits, and resources that help partners drive demand and close deals.

 - Partner closely with Sales and Partnerships teams to support joint business planning, strategic accounts, and partner-led growth initiatives.

 - Collaborate with Marketing Science to translate OpenAI’s measurement capabilities (incrementality, attribution, MMM, clean rooms) into partner-ready narratives that align with industry frameworks.

 - Track and analyze partner marketing performance, including pipeline contribution, campaign ROI, partner-sourced revenue, and conversion metrics—using insights to optimize future investments.

 - Build scalable frameworks for partner segmentation, prioritization, and success measurement across global markets.


YOU MIGHT BE A GREAT FIT IF YOU…

 - Have experience in partner marketing, alliances, or ecosystem marketing, particularly in advertising, ad tech, martech, or SaaS environments.

 - Have built and executed joint GTM strategies and co-marketing campaigns with external partners that drive measurable pipeline and revenue impact.

 - Are skilled at partner relationship management, with a track record of building trust and aligning cross-company stakeholders.

 - Have experience creating co-branded content and sales enablement materials that support both marketing and sales motions.

 - Are comfortable analyzing marketing performance and ROI, including partner contribution to pipeline, conversion, and revenue.

 - Can bridge technical and commercial perspectives, turning product capabilities into compelling joint value propositions.

 - Thrive in cross-functional environments and can influence across Product, Sales, Partnerships, and Marketing without direct authority.

 - Are highly organized and able to manage multiple partners, campaigns, and priorities simultaneously.

 - Enjoy building new programs from the ground up in fast-moving, ambiguous environments.

 - Care deeply about building a trusted advertising ecosystem that enables long-term success for partners and advertisers.

About OpenAI

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. We push the boundaries of the capabilities of AI systems and seek to safely deploy them to the world through our products. AI is an extremely powerful tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its core, and to achieve our mission, we must encompass and value the many different perspectives, voices, and experiences that form the full spectrum of humanity. 

We are an equal opportunity employer, and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, age, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or other applicable legally protected characteristic.

For additional information, please see OpenAI’s Affirmative Action and Equal Employment Opportunity Policy Statement https://cdn.openai.com/policies/eeo-policy-statement.pdf.

Background checks for applicants will be administered in accordance with applicable law, and qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment consistent with those laws, including the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair Chance Act, for US-based candidates. For unincorporated Los Angeles County workers: we reasonably believe that criminal history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship with the following job duties, potentially resulting in the withdrawal of a conditional offer of employment: protect computer hardware entrusted to you from theft, loss or damage; return all computer hardware in your possession (including the data contained therein) upon termination of employment or end of assignment; and maintain the confidentiality of proprietary, confidential, and non-public information. In addition, job duties require access to secure and protected information technology systems and related data security obligations.

To notify OpenAI that you believe this job posting is non-compliant, please submit a report through this form https://form.asana.com/?d=57018692298241&k=5MqR40fZd7jlxVUh5J-UeA. No response will be provided to inquiries unrelated to job posting compliance.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with disabilities, and requests can be made via this link https://form.asana.com/?k=bQ7w9h3iexRlicUdWRiwvg&d=57018692298241.

OpenAI Global Applicant Privacy Policy https://cdn.openai.com/policies/global-employee-and-contractor-privacy-policy.pdf

At OpenAI, we believe artificial intelligence has the potential to help people solve immense global challenges, and we want the upside of AI to be widely shared. Join us in shaping the future of technology.
fields.title: Partner Marketing Lead
